summary: Bagged-item storage migrated from virtual grid coords to slot coords; bag_id tightened from artifactId to loadout row id. Full 297-test suite green.

AC1.proof: tests/game/bag-items.test.js [Req 12-D, 5-A] asserts round1Bagged.y === 0 (slot coord, not INVENTORY_ROWS virtual coord) after PUT.

AC2.proof: Same scenario asserts round1Bagged.bag_id === round1BagRowId (SELECTed from the bag's own row), not the 'moss_pouch' artifact id.

AC3.proof: Same scenario asserts round2BagRowId !== round1BagRowId and zero orphan rows; copyRoundForward two-pass map implementation in app/server/services/game-run-loadout.js.

AC4.proof: tests/game/validator-split.test.js — slot-bounds rejection, per-bag overlap rejection, duplicate-bag row-id disambiguation.

AC5.proof: web/src/composables/useGameRun.js:buildLoadoutPayloadItems emits y: item.y - info.startRow and bagId: info.bagRowId. End-to-end exercised by the AC1/AC2 scenario.

AC6.proof: tests/web/loadout-projection.test.js — slot-to-virtual reconstruction (single, second-slot, multi-bag, duplicate-bag) + legacy/inactive/OOB fallbacks.

AC7.proof: tests/web/use-shop.test.js [bag-relayout] — deactivate earlier empty bag shifts later bag's items up; rotate earlier empty bag shifts later bag's items by rowCount delta; deactivate non-empty bag stays blocked.

AC8.proof: tests/web/loadout-projection.test.js three regression tests pin container fallback for bagId=artifactId, (-1,-1), and inactive-bag cases.

out_of_scope: Playwright round-2 prep screenshot — DB + projection unit tests cover the invariants; dev stack not spun up for this task.
SQL backfill of legacy rows — explicit non-goal, pre-production data only, projection fallback absorbs legacy shapes.
